articles.title: Baidu (BIDU) Stock Could Be Undervalued On Hong Kong Listing Shift
articles.summary: Baidu stock sits at an interesting valuation crossroad, with the share price recovering over the past year but still showing a 36.8% decline over five years, while its broader valuation checks lean more expensive than cheap. Over the last five years, Baidu has delivered a cumulative return that is down 36.8%, which means long term holders are still under water despite the recent rebound. Recent headlines around Baidu's AI partnerships and expansion in robotaxis can support higher growth...
